name: Yelp
tags: france; germany; netherlands; ireland; spain-es; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph: Yelp connects people with local businesses with trusted local business information, photos and review content. It's a one-stop local platform for consumers to discover, connect and transact with local businesses of all sizes by making it easy to request a quote, join a waitlist or make a reservation, and make an appointment or purchase. Yelp has 76.7 million unique visitors via its mobile website monthly.
integration_summary: For businesses, managing location data on Facebook now a breeze with Synup.
